rationale: Same scarcity as L3. The one loosely relevant figure found (Wellfound: embedded engineer in software startups, 7-10 YOE average ~$150K) sits close to the dataset's L4 base p50 of $144K, which is a mildly encouraging directional signal, but it is a blended aggregator average without company names, level definitions, or a way to verify methodology — not solid enough to move off low.
